# Your Property Guide
> Your Property Guide is an Australian property resource covering suburb profiles, market data, buying guides, selling tips, investment strategy, and property news. We help Australians make smarter property decisions.

## About
- [About Us](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/about): Our mission to make Australian property research easier.
- [Contact](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/contact): Get in touch with our team.

## Property Research
- [Suburb Profiles](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/suburbs): Median prices, demographics, schools, and growth data for Australian suburbs.
- [Market Data](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/market): Property market trends, auction results, and price movements.

## Guides
- [Buying a Home](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/buying): Step-by-step guides for first home buyers and upgraders.
- [Selling Property](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/selling): How to sell your home for the best price.
- [Property Investment](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/investing): Investment strategy, rental yields, and how to build a portfolio.
- [Home Loans](https://www.yourpropertyguide.com.au/guides/home-loans): Mortgage guides, comparison tips, and borrowing capacity.
